title: App Settings - General - Account - Invite sent, user logs during the installation, not registered on Cloud
scenario: IT admin invites mobile user; user installs app and logs in on mobile without accepting invite externally, resulting in login with no tenant association and missing Tenant ID/Name on the card.
steps: IT admin sends an invite to a mobile user.
Mobile user does not accept the invite via an external source (e.g., laptop).
Mobile user installs the app on their mobile phone.
Mobile user logs in during onboarding.
expected: The mobile user should be properly registered on Cloud with the tenant assigned (Tenant ID/Name rows should be present on the card).
